nasb.text: Be warned, O Jerusalem, Or I shall be alienated from you, And make you a desolation, A land not inhabited.”

esv.text: Be warned, O Jerusalem, lest I turn from you in disgust, lest I make you a desolation, an uninhabited land.”

cnv.text: 耶路撒冷啊！應當受警戒， 免得我的心與你疏遠， 免得我使你荒涼， 成為無人居住之地。”

ccb.text: 耶路撒冷啊，你要接受告诫， 否则我要离弃你， 使你荒无人烟。”
